member.name: T:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.ChatSessionController
member.summary: Manages chat sessions including creation, polling, and completion

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.ChatSessionController.CreateChatSession(SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.CreateChatSessionRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new chat session and adds it to the queue
member.param: The user information to create a chat session
member.returns: The created chat session with status and assignment information
member.response: Chat session created and queued successfully
Chat session refused - all queues are full

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.ChatSessionController.GetChatSession(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the current status of a chat session
member.param: The unique identifier of the chat session
member.response: Chat session found and returned successfully

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.ChatSessionController.PollChatSession(System.String)
member.summary: Polls a chat session to keep it active (should be called every 1 second)
member.param: The unique identifier of the chat session
member.returns: The current poll status including agent assignment
member.remarks: The client must poll this endpoint every 1 second to keep the session active. If 3 consecutive polls are missed, the session will be marked as inactive.

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.ChatSessionController.CompleteChatSession(System.String)
member.summary: Completes a chat session and releases the assigned agent
member.param: The unique identifier of the chat session

member.name: T:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController
member.summary: Diagnostic endpoints for troubleshooting

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.ManuallyAssignSession(System.String)
member.summary: Manually triggers assignment for a specific session (for debugging)

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.DiagnoseSession(System.String)
member.summary: Gets diagnostic information about why a session might not be assigned

member.name: T:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.SystemStatusController
member.summary: Provides system status and monitoring information

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.SystemStatusController.GetTeamsStatus
member.summary: Gets the current status of all teams and their agents
member.returns: Detailed information about teams, agents, capacities, and availability

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.SystemStatusController.GetQueueStatus
member.summary: Gets the current status of all queued chat sessions
member.returns: Information about queued, assigned, and active sessions

member.name: M:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Controllers.SystemStatusController.GetHealth
member.summary: Health check endpoint to verify the API is running

member.name: T:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.ChatSessionResponse
member.summary: Response model containing chat session information

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.ChatSessionResponse.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the chat session

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.ChatSessionResponse.Status
member.summary: Current status of the chat session (Queued, Assigned, Active, Inactive, Completed, Refused)

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.ChatSessionResponse.AssignedAgentId
member.summary: The ID of the agent assigned to this session (null if not yet assigned)

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.ChatSessionResponse.CreatedAt
member.summary: The timestamp when the session was created

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.ChatSessionResponse.AssignedAt
member.summary: The timestamp when an agent was assigned (null if not yet assigned)

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.ChatSessionResponse.IsOverflow
member.summary: Indicates if this session is in the overflow queue

member.name: T:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.CreateChatSessionRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating a new chat session

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.CreateChatSessionRequest.UserId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the user requesting support

member.name: T:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.PollResponse
member.summary: Response model for chat session polling

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.PollResponse.Success
member.summary: Indicates if the poll was successful

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.PollResponse.Status
member.summary: Current status of the chat session

member.name: P:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.Models.PollResponse.AssignedAgentId
member.summary: The ID of the assigned agent (null if not yet assigned)

member.name: T:SupportAssignmentSystem.Api.MonitoringBackgroundService
member.summary: Background service that monitors sessions and manages shifts Runs within the API process to share the same in-memory state
